description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:14.18.1-alpine Docker image and caches the Yarn directories (.yarn/cache/, .yarn/unplugged/, .yarn/build-state.yml). Define a single job named ci in the default test stage that runs: apk add --no-cache git make python3 util-linux, then yarn install --immutable, yarn build, and yarn dlx git-is-clean. Configure the job to upload any files matching dist/public_ip_display-*.zip as artifacts. No services or special triggers are required.
